_source: Spheres of Power/Might/Guile talent progressions, verified cell-by-cell against the wiki class tables (spheresofpower.wikidot.com). full/threeQuarter/half are the standard 1/level, 3/4, and 1/2 progressions (identical to babAtLevel and to casterProgression high/mid/low); virtuoso is the Guile 'Any + Utility' total (verified vs Envoy). Cumulative talents known at each character level 1-20.

_verifiedAgainst.full: Fey Adept/Incanter base (High magic), Conscript (Expert combat), Agent Any+Utility total (Journeyman skill)
_verifiedAgainst.threeQuarter: Elementalist Magic Talents column (Mid magic), Commander/Technician (Adept combat)
_verifiedAgainst.half: Armiger Combat Talents column (Proficient combat); = casterProgression.low (Low magic)
_verifiedAgainst.virtuoso: Envoy Any+Utility total (Virtuoso skill) = ceil(3L/4) + floor(L/2)
